column1: # ZAP Scanner Rules — False Positive Suppression
# Format: Rule-ID
# Reference: https://www.zaproxy.org/docs/desktop/addons/alert-filters/
# Rule IDs: https://www.zaproxy.org/docs/alerts/
# Legend:
#   IGNORE = suppress the alert entirely
#   WARN   = report but do not fail the CI job
#   FAIL   = fail the CI job on this alert
# Maintain this file. Review suppressed rules quarterly and remove
# any that no longer apply after security improvements are made.
# Last reviewed: April 2026
# Vite SPA uses inline scripts for hydration; strict-dynamic CSP is planned
# pending migration to GovCloud. Remove once CSP nonce headers are deployed.

column3: Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set

column1: # Vercel sets frame-ancestors in CSP; legacy X-Frame-Options is redundant.
# Kept as WARN to track when visiting with older tools.
# Static assets on Vercel CDN have immutable cache headers by design.
# API routes set no-store. This alert fires on CDN edge responses.
# ─── Information Disclosure — Informational ────────────────────────────────
# Vercel returns Server: Vercel header; not a vulnerability.

column3: Server Leaks Version Information via "Server" HTTP Response Header

column1: # ─── Alerts that should FAIL the build ─────────────────────────────────────
# Any of these found = critical security issue, must block merge.
